ie.updateNote: As a result of Storm Daniel, parts of Bulgaria have experienced torrential rain and flooding. Police are controlling access on all roads in the Tsarevo Municipality. Irish citizens visiting Bulgaria are strongly advised to regularly check on weather conditions in affected areas. Citizens currently in or planning travel to the Tsarevo Municipality should check beforehand with tour operators/hotels
